name: division-by-zero
description: Occurs when a division operation uses a denominator that evaluates to zero.

name: null-pointer-dereference
description: Occurs when a program attempts to access memory through a NULL pointer.

name: buffer-overflow
description: Occurs when writing beyond the bounds of an allocated buffer.

name: uninitialized-variable
description: Occurs when a variable is used without being initialized.

name: memory-leak
message_template: Allocated memory for '%s' is not freed.
description: Occurs when dynamically allocated memory is not released with free().

name: invalid-pointer-arithmetic
description: Occurs when pointer arithmetic leads to invalid memory access.

name: dangling-pointer
description: Occurs when a pointer refers to memory that has already been freed.

name: array-index-out-of-bounds
message_template: Array index out of bounds for '%s'.
description: Occurs when an array index exceeds its declared size.

name: double-free
description: Occurs when free() is called twice on the same memory address.

name: invalid-free
description: Occurs when free() is used on memory not allocated by malloc/calloc/realloc.

name: use-after-free
message_template: Using memory after it has been freed.
description: Occurs when a pointer is used after calling free().

name: stack-overflow
description: Occurs when recursion or large allocations exceed stack limits.

name: format-string-vulnerability
description: Occurs when printf uses user input directly as format string.

name: invalid-type-cast
description: Occurs when casting incompatible data types.

name: function-pointer-mismatch
description: Occurs when assigning incompatible function pointers.

name: unused-variable
description: Occurs when a variable is declared but never used.

name: implicit-type-conversion
description: Occurs when a value is automatically converted to another type.

name: missing-return
description: Occurs when a non-void function does not return a value.

name: infinite-loop
description: Occurs when loop condition never changes.

name: unused-function
description: Occurs when a function is defined but not called.

name: unused-parameter
description: Occurs when a function parameter is never used.

name: comparison-with-assignment
description: Occurs when '=' is used instead of '==' inside conditions.

name: shadowed-variable
description: Occurs when a variable hides another variable with same name.

name: unsafe-function-usage
description: Occurs when unsafe functions like gets(), strcpy() are used.

name: missing-header
description: Occurs when a function is used without including the proper header.

name: magic-number
description: Occurs when numeric literals are used instead of constants.

name: long-function
description: Occurs when a function becomes excessively long.

name: deep-nesting
description: Occurs when code has excessive nested control structures.

name: missing-braces
description: Occurs when if/while/for statements lack braces.

name: global-variable-usage
description: Occurs when global variables are used excessively.

name: multiple-return-statements
description: Occurs when a function contains many return statements.

name: undefined-symbol
description: Usage of a variable or function that has not been declared.
